mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_notification (title, content, type, priority, related_type, related_id, sender_id, sender_name, create_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{priority}, #{relatedType}, #{relatedId}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, type, priority, related_type, related_id, sender_id, sender_name, create_time FROM system_notification WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
